name: icl
description:
v3 vs v4 (train)
1. in_proj input	noise_ch + hidden_ch	2×noise_ch + hidden_ch
2. Block conditioning	c (global speaker)	t (timestep only)
3. Forward args	(t, x, mask, mu, c, ...)	(t, x, cond, mask, mu, ...)

v3 vs v4 (train)
1. Signature	mu, cond, seq_style	mu_tgt, cond_ref, mu_ref, seq_style_tgt, seq_style_ref
2. ODE initial z	randn_like(mu) * temperature (T_tgt only)	concat([cond_ref, noise_tgt], dim=-1) (T_full)
3. cond	interpolated to T_tgt	concat([cond_ref, zeros_tgt], dim=-1) (T_full)
4. mu	single asr_res(mu)	separate asr_res(mu_ref) + asr_res(mu_tgt), then concat
5. seq_style	single pe_encode(seq_style)	separate pe_encode for ref/tgt, then concat
Output	trajectory[-1] (full)	trajectory[-1][:, :, T_ref:] (tgt only)


train_first_txt2mel_cfm_icl.py  before after
1. st / style ref	sampled per batch item	removed
2. s = style_encoder(...)	called every step	removed
3. compute_loss call	(gt, mask, mu=en, c=s, seq_style=pe, p_mask=...)	(gt, mu=en, seq_style=pe)
4. learn_monoAttn block	present	removed
5. g_loss	λ_mel·cfm + λ_adv·cfm + λ_mono + λ_s2s + λ_monoAttn	λ_mel·cfm + λ_mono + λ_s2s
6. optimizer.step	text_encoder + style_encoder + decoder	text_encoder + decoder",,,"
